paper_metadata.title: LLaMA: Open and Efficient Foundation Language Models
paper_metadata.abstract: We introduce LLaMA, a collection of foundation language models ranging from 7B to 65B parameters. We train our models on trillions of tokens, and show that it is possible to train state-of-the-art models using publicly available datasets exclusively, without resorting to proprietary and inaccessible datasets. In particular, LLaMA-13B outperforms GPT-3 (175B) on most benchmarks, and LLaMA-65B is competitive with the best models, Chinchilla-70B and PaLM-540B. We release all our models to the research community.

extraction_data.innovation: LLaMA models are designed to achieve state-of-the-art performance at various inference budgets by training on large public datasets (CommonCrawl, Books, Wikipedia, ArXiv, Stack Exchange, GitHub) and using a Transformer architecture with optimized hyperparameters. The key innovation is the use of publicly available data and efficient training to achieve competitive performance without proprietary datasets.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: CommonCrawl (67%), Books (4.5%), Wikipedia (4.5%), ArXiv (2.5%), Stack Exchange (2%), GitHub (4.5%)
extraction_data.extension: The model's performance on code generation tasks may be due to its pre-training on a diverse corpus including books and academic papers, which provides a broad context for understanding code-like text.
extraction_data.research_problem: Efficient large-scale language model training and inference
extraction_data.application: General language tasks, including question answering, text generation, and more.
extraction_data.paper_title: LLaMA: Open and Efficient Foundation Language Models

extraction_data.innovation: LLaMA introduces a family of efficient, open-source language models trained on large-scale text data using a Transformer architecture. The innovation lies in achieving state-of-the-art performance with smaller parameter counts compared to prior models.
extraction_data.application: General language tasks, including question answering, text generation, and more.
